creator: khaelin@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

The ngircd¹ port hasn't been updated since version 0.10.1. The current stable version is Release 14.1.

I have updated my local port for the 14.1, and thought it would be a good idea to submit the update.

So here is the Makefile and distinfo files.

[1] http://www.freshports.org/irc/ngircd

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
